response: DataFlow AI, a startup founded in 2022, is currently in the Series A funding stage with a valuation of $42 million. The company has successfully raised $8.5 million in funding, supported by prominent investors such as Sequoia and Y Combinator (YC). With a dedicated team of 18 people, DataFlow AI operates in the data infrastructure sector and has achieved a monthly recurring revenue (MRR) of $120,000, alongside a robust growth rate of 25% month-over-month.
